name: model_elements
role: number of frequency-model symbols; counts table has this many widths

name: range_overflow_total_width
role: total cumulative-frequency range (top of the counts table)

name: range_overflow_shift
role: shift used when range-decoding the overflow symbol index

name: ksum_pivot_divisor
role: pivot value = max(KSum / this, 1) for the >=3990 value decode

name: stage1_filter_weight
role: fixed weight of the order-1 integer prediction stage (x*weight>>shift)

name: predictor_history_seed
role: initial adaptation coefficient seeded into the order-1 history slot
